description: You are a backend developer at AcmeCorp. The e-commerce backend application at ~/projects/ecommerce-app/ uses Docker Compose to run five services: a PostgreSQL database (acme-db), a Redis cache (acme-cache), a Node.js API (acme-api), an Nginx reverse proxy (acme-nginx), and a Python background worker (acme-worker). The application is currently failing to start correctly. Diagnose and fix all five configuration errors within docker-compose.yml and nginx.conf so that all services run successfully and the API responds correctly at http://localhost:8080/api/products. Login: user ga, password password123.
